title: Judge rules Georgia Republican official illegally voted 9 times
shortDescription: Outspoken election denier Brian Pritchard insisted voter fraud cost former President Donald Trump the 2020 election. Now a judge has fined him $5,000.

title: Who are the top donors to Biden, Trump and RFK Jr.?
shortDescription: We are tracking the presidential election fundraising for Joe Biden, Donald Trump and Robert F. Kennedy Jr. Story will update as new filings come in.

title: Trump lawyer asks to dismiss Georgia charges based on First Amendment
shortDescription: Donald Trump's lawyer contends the former president can't be prosecuted for election interference because the First Amendment shields even lies.

title: House GOP to send Mayorkas impeachment articles to Senate on April 10
shortDescription: House Republicans will deliver articles of impeachment against Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas on April 10.

title: Chris Christie says he won't run against Trump on a third-party ticket
shortDescription: Chris Christie, a vocal critic of Donald Trump, said Wednesday that he won’t run against the former president on a third party ticket.

title: Biden speaks on historic climate change plans
shortDescription: At the State of the Union Address, President Biden spoke to the American people about taking action on climate change, creating clean-energy jobs and conserving the environment.

title: OnPolitics: Obama, Clinton and Biden will hold a fundraiser
shortDescription: As Joe Biden works to unite all factions of the Democratic Party, his campaign will get an assist Thursday night Barack Obama and Bill Clinton.

title: Florida's new 'Property Rights' law one of many bills to end squatting
shortDescription: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis signed the Property Rights bill into law Wednesday. Other states are also considering bills that would curb squatter rights.

title: Ron DeSantis signs bill cracking down on squatters in Florida
shortDescription: Governor Ron DeSantis signed legislation that will crack down on squatters in Florida.

title: Liz Cheney warns of danger of electing Trump back to the White House
shortDescription: The future of the country's democracy hinges on Donald Trump's defeat warns Wyoming Republican

title: Obama, Clinton to show up − and shore up $25M − as Biden looks to unite Dems
shortDescription: The rare showing of three presidents presents a united Democratic front for Joe Biden and will haul in at least $25 million for the Biden campaign.

title: Who Is Mike Johnson? Why did Marjorie Taylor Greene push to oust him?
shortDescription: Speaker of the House Mike Johnson faces a dilemma – bend to the will of Marjorie Taylor Greene or face being ousted like his predecessor.

title: Abortion rights advocates eye almost a dozen state ballots in 2024
shortDescription: Advocates for abortion access hope to continue their winning streak in these states, including key election battlegrounds, with citizens initiatives.

title: Election 2024 calendar: Important dates to watch ahead of Election Day
shortDescription: With President Joe Biden and former president Donald Trump obtaining enough delegates to secure their respective party's nominations, the rematch is set.

title: Appeals court keeps Texas' immigration law on hold under new ruling
shortDescription: In the Tuesday night decision, the court walked through a number of issues it must contend with in ruling on the law, which will be heard on April 3.

title: California judge recommends disbarment for Trump lawyer John Eastman
shortDescription: A California judge recommended disbarring John Eastman, one of Donald Trump's lawyers baselessly challenging the 2020 election results.
